Enable Custom WGDC Override
parameters.description: Setting to 1 will override the base WGDC % with the value from our MHD+ Custom WGDC Base table

parameters.name: Enable Custom WGDC P and D Factors
parameters.description: Setting to 1 will apply the output of our MHD+ Custom WGDC P and D factor tables to WGDC base.

parameters.name: WGDC P-Factor (Custom)
parameters.description: Output of this table gets added to (or subtracted from) WGDC Base % when then custom factor enable flag is set
